task: Freeze instance and alert filter contract
acceptance_criteria: Approved query params for `/control/instances` and `/alerts` are explicit in code and task notes
notes: Closed with the approved minimum contract: instance filters by `name`/`environment`/`label`/`status`, and alert filters by `status`/`severity`/`instance`/`opened_after`/`opened_before`

task: Implement backend filtering semantics and focused API tests
acceptance_criteria: FastAPI routes and services honor the approved filters without regressing existing organization scope behavior
notes: Implemented service-layer filtering for assets and alerts plus focused route tests that cover PRD closeout fields without rewriting repository/query layers

task: Extend typed client and web filter surfaces
acceptance_criteria: Typed client accepts filter objects and the instances/alerts pages expose GET filter forms that round-trip via query params
validation_command: pnpm openapi:check && pnpm --filter web test && pnpm --filter web typecheck
notes: Added typed client filter objects, server-rendered GET forms on `/instances` and `/alerts`, normalized filter helpers, and web tests for default/override behavior

task: Run focused signoff and update task truth
acceptance_criteria: All focused gates pass and task artifacts describe exactly what contract was closed
validation_command: uv run pytest tests/integration/control_plane/test_control_plane.py tests/api/alerting/test_alerting_contract.py && pnpm openapi:check && pnpm --filter web test && pnpm --filter web typecheck
